programmes.show_description: After discovering that the teapot in her secondhand shop is worth thousands of dollars, Rose grabs the attention of an ambitious antique dealer. (2022)
At first, Savannah is hired to rebrand a New York radio host. But then she finds herself co-hosting with him. What other twists and turns might their relationship encounter? (2022)
After their children get into a fight at school, a competitive single mum and stubborn single dad are both roped in to producing the school's play - Romeo and Juliet. (2022)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
40-year-old book editor Juniper is magically reconnected with an eight-year-old version of herself who questions her life choices, including the dream of writing her own stories. (2024)
While staying at the Lemon Tree Farm, budding photographer Beck must save things from growing sour and help the handsome owner save his land. Zesty romance. (2022)
Theme Park performer Lacey becomes friends with eight-year-old princess Rose and is swept up in the royal world of luxury and nobility. Nichole Sakura stars. (2025)
After being called out during the launch of her landmark study on love, an acclaimed professor is forced to take her own dating test with the man who criticised it. (2022)
Heilda encounters a charming local artisan while selling her beautiful, handmade glass ornaments at the Heidelberg Christmas Market in Germany. (2023)
A couple struggling to conceive receives an antique watch from a stranger, leading the wife to realise that the answers she seeks will come in due time. (2024)
After rescuing a hive, beekeeper Eva is thrown into a bumbling quest across Malta with Austen, an archaeologist. Buzzing romcom. (2024)
When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. (2023)
In order to get a promotion, a chef must turn the worst restaurant in the city around... in two weeks. But as she cooks up a storm, her relationship with the owner starts to sizzle. (2023)
When a professional bridesmaid books a high-profile wedding, she must keep her identity a secret not just from the guests, but also from the handsome reporter covering the event. (2023)
A single mum tracks down her daughter's biological father in a wild journey of trust, love and hope. As Ruby connects with her dad, could Amelia also be meeting the one? (2024)

Teleshopping.
Teacher Drew returns home to help at his family's cider mill, where he meets a new class of students, which leads him to reconsider his temporary stay in Chestnut Hollow. (2023)
The Postables return as they try to identify the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters that have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. (2024)
Could swapping homes be the key to unlocking pianist Ellie and author Leo's potential, and maybe even their hearts? (2023)
After missing out on a promotion, Monica walks the Camino de Santiago. She's surprised when she finds inner peace and a potential romance. (2025)
At first, Savannah is hired to rebrand a New York radio host. But then she finds herself co-hosting with him. What other twists and turns might their relationship encounter? (2022)
When Philly mechanic Johnny learns that his long-lost father is a duke, he reluctantly enters the world of royalty. Starring Emilie de Ravin. (2025)
